_primary_source: Primary source: (Hellwarth, 1977) DOI 10.1364/JOSA.67.000001; (Yariv, 1978) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1978.1069870; (Zel'dovich, 1985) ISBN 978-3-540-13458-4; (Agarwal & Friberg) scattering theory of distortion correction by phase conjugation. Four-wave-mixing phase conjugation and the distortion-correction theorem.
title: QA_FWM_PHASE_CONJUGATE_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Four-Wave-Mixing Phase Conjugate Cert [518]: exact realization of the FWM phase-sum relation and distortion-correction theorem in the QA additive group on {1,...,m}.

signal_state.description: clean signal phase state s in {1,...,m}

phase_screen.description: forward distorting medium phi (per-site modular shift)

pump_forward.description: forward pump p_f; backward pump is qa_neg(p_f)

return_screen.description: return medium phi'; equals phase_screen for same-medium recovery

expected_recovered.description: claimed recovered state = qa_mod(-s + return_screen - phase_screen)
